reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_29. ch is assigned from malloc() at L29, which can return NULL. ch->ifname = ifname at L30 then dereferences the potentially-NULL ch pointer. Genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L30 (// ERROR is at L43 for a different bug). New bug. PC = (STRICT_ANSI OR !STRICT_ANSI) = true, correctly constrained — bug fires in all configs since L29-30 are outside any #ifdef blocks.
